description_long: This is a thick, hardcover book with a visually striking cover featuring a wood grain pattern in warm, earthy tones. The book appears to be substantial in size, with a dense block of white or light gray pages visible along the sides. The cover design is modern and artistic, with large, bold numbers and abstract shapes layered over the wood texture. The spine and front cover both display prominent black text, and the book's edges are crisp and well-defined. The overall appearance suggests a high-quality, professionally produced volume, likely intended as a coffee table or reference book. The book's sturdy construction and weight make it suitable for display or regular use in an urban environment.
description: A large, thick hardcover book with a wood grain patterned cover, bold black text, and crisp, dense pages. The design is modern and artistic, giving the book a high-quality, substantial appearance.
description_view_0: The book is viewed from the bottom edge, showing the thickness of the pages and the lower part of the cover's wood grain pattern.
description_view_1: The book is seen from the spine side, displaying the full length of the spine with bold black text and the continuation of the wood grain design.
description_view_2: The book is viewed from the top edge, highlighting the front cover's wood grain pattern, large numbers, and prominent black text.
description_view_3: The book is seen from the opposite side of the spine, showing the unadorned page edges and the side of the cover.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a stylized wood grain pattern in shades of brown and beige, overlaid with large, abstract numbers and shapes. The design is modern and graphic, with no figurative or representational imagery.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is covered in the same wood grain pattern as the front, with bold black text running horizontally along its length. The design is clean and modern, with no additional decorative elements.
